summary: Repointed performers/venues search from the non-existent /performers/search & /venues/search (?q= ignored, routed as slug) to the real /autocomplete/suggestions?q= endpoint, extracting data.performers / data.venues.
reason: Discovery misread the /performers/search response shape (field types, not values); the API routes 'search' as a slug. The real multi-type search is /autocomplete/suggestions, found by browser-sniffing the site search box.
validated_outcome: performers search 'ariana' -> [Ariana Grande, Mariana Mazza, ...]; venues search 'garden' -> [Madison Square Garden, TD Garden, ...]. Now real multi-result.
